creator: bsd@wylie.nl
text:
There's no entry for a 3com 3CRPAG175 Wireless PC Card in pccarddevs

#devinfo -v
unknown pnpinfo
vendor=0xa727
device=0x0013
subvendor=0x10b7
subdevice=0x1026
class=0x020000

#pciconf -lv
vendor       =    '3com Corporation'
device       =    '3CRPAG175 Wireless PC Card'
class        =     network
subclass     =     ethernet

According to /sys/dev/pccard/pccarddevs, 3Com's ID is 0x0101. So this is
different from the CIS info.
